title: Giant Bomb API Vocabulary
description: Domain terms and concepts used in the Giant Bomb API

terms.label: Globally Unique Identifier
terms.description: A unique identifier for any resource in the Giant Bomb database, formatted as XXXX-XXXXXXXX where the prefix indicates the resource type.

terms.label: API Key
terms.description: A personal API key required to authenticate all requests to the Giant Bomb API. Obtained by registering an account at giantbomb.com.

terms.label: Response Format
terms.description: The format in which the API returns data. Supported values are 'json' and 'xml'.

terms.label: Field List
terms.description: A comma-separated list of field names to include in the response. Use this to reduce response size by requesting only needed fields.

terms.label: Result Limit
terms.description: The maximum number of results to return per page. Maximum value is 100.

terms.label: Result Offset
terms.description: The number of results to skip before returning results. Used for pagination.

terms.label: Sort Order
terms.description: Field to sort results by. Prefix with a colon and 'asc' or 'desc' to set direction. Example: 'name:asc'.

terms.label: Filter Expression
terms.description: A field:value pair used to filter results. Multiple filters can be combined with commas.

terms.label: Deck
terms.description: A brief one-paragraph plain-text summary of a resource, used as a short description across the Giant Bomb site.

terms.label: API Status Code
terms.description: Numeric code indicating the result of the API request.

terms.label: Game
terms.description: A video game entry in the Giant Bomb database, containing metadata such as name, release date, platforms, genres, developers, and publishers.

terms.label: Platform
terms.description: A gaming hardware platform or operating system on which games are released (e.g., PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, PC).

terms.label: Character
terms.description: A fictional character that appears in one or more video games.

terms.label: Company
terms.description: A business entity involved in the video game industry as a developer, publisher, or other role.

terms.label: Franchise
terms.description: A named series or brand that encompasses multiple related video game titles.

terms.label: Concept
terms.description: A gameplay mechanic, design pattern, or general concept documented in the Giant Bomb wiki.

terms.label: Location
terms.description: A fictional or real-world location that appears within video games.

terms.label: Object
terms.description: A physical item or in-game object that appears in video games.

terms.label: Person
terms.description: A real-world person involved in the video game industry (developer, designer, voice actor, etc.).

terms.label: Release
terms.description: A specific regional release of a game, potentially with different release dates, names, or content from other regional releases.

terms.label: Review
terms.description: An editorial review of a video game published by Giant Bomb staff, including a score and written critique.

terms.label: Video
terms.description: A video production published by Giant Bomb, such as a Quick Look, review video, or feature.

terms.label: Theme
terms.description: A narrative or aesthetic theme used to categorize and describe video games.
